AssistantChunkFrame.description: backend -> TUI: streaming assistant text delta.

correlation_id.description: UUIDv7 string for new emissions; ULID accepted for back-compat. Non-empty; emitter SHOULD use UUIDv7. (E5)
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with sub-ms precision.
ts.title: Ts

version.description: Envelope version. Hard-fail on mismatch (E1, FR-001).
version.title: Version

role.description: Origin role. Validated against kind<->role allow-list (E3, FR-004).
role.title: Role

frame_seq.description: Per-session monotonic sequence number (ge=0). Gap detection uses this.
frame_seq.title: Frame Seq

transaction_id.description: UUIDv7. Populated for idempotent state-change frames (irreversible tools). None for streaming chunks. (FR-026)
transaction_id.title: Transaction Id

trailer.description: Completion/validation metadata. Populated on terminal frames. (FR-006)

message_id.description: ULID of the assistant message this delta belongs to.
message_id.title: Message Id

delta.description: UTF-8 text appended to the message.
delta.title: Delta

done.description: True if this is the terminal chunk for this message_id.
done.title: Done

AssistantChunkFrame.title: AssistantChunkFrame

BackpressureSignalFrame.description:
Emitted when outgoing queue crosses HWM or a 429 condition is detected.

role allow-list: tui (tui_reader), backend (backend_writer, upstream_429).
FR-012, FR-015: hud_copy_ko/en MUST be non-empty (min_length=1).

correlation_id.description: UUIDv7 string for new emissions; ULID accepted for back-compat. Non-empty; emitter SHOULD use UUIDv7. (E5)
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with sub-ms precision.
ts.title: Ts

version.description: Envelope version. Hard-fail on mismatch (E1, FR-001).
version.title: Version

role.description: Origin role. Validated against kind<->role allow-list (E3, FR-004).
role.title: Role

frame_seq.description: Per-session monotonic sequence number (ge=0). Gap detection uses this.
frame_seq.title: Frame Seq

transaction_id.description: UUIDv7. Populated for idempotent state-change frames (irreversible tools). None for streaming chunks. (FR-026)
transaction_id.title: Transaction Id

trailer.description: Completion/validation metadata. Populated on terminal frames. (FR-006)

signal.description: Reader action. pause=stop emitting; resume=clear; throttle=slow down.
signal.title: Signal

retry_after_ms.description: For throttle sourced from upstream_429; reflects Retry-After. ge=0.
retry_after_ms.title: Retry After Ms

hud_copy_ko.description: Korean HUD copy (civic-facing). Must be non-empty (FR-015).
hud_copy_ko.title: Hud Copy Ko

hud_copy_en.description: English HUD copy (dev-facing). Must be non-empty (FR-015).
hud_copy_en.title: Hud Copy En

HeartbeatFrame.description:
Emitted every 30 s (default) by both sides to prove liveness.

Note: Heartbeat frames do NOT increment frame_seq — they use a dedicated
counter. This keeps ring-buffer economy tight.
role allow-list: tui, backend.

ResumeResponseFrame.description:
Backend accepts the resume.

Must be followed by replay of frames with frame_seq > last_seen_frame_seq.
Trailer with final=True MUST be set (E6).
role allow-list: backend.
